hypothesis: If a generative materials design agent couples LLM-based planning with external knowledge tools (memories, periodic table, knowledge base) and iterative structure–property feedback (DiffCSP + iComFormer), then it will generate valid, novel inorganic compositions and structures that hit specified formation-energy targets (±0.25 eV/atom) at higher success rates than tool-free LLMs or diffusion-only baselines because tool-guided reasoning and feedback efficiently steer proposals toward property-aligned candidates.
